title: neyraudia arundinacea var. zollingeri
intro: Neyraudia arundinacea var. zollingeri, also known as Zollinger's Neyraudia, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Neyraudia arundinacea var. zollingeri include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and skin infections. Neyraudia arundinacea var. zollingeri is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
